narrative:
Mt. Orab Village has 2,883 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.0 percentage points.
